title: geum glaciale
intro: Geum glaciale, also known as the alpine avens, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the root and leaves of Geum glaciale are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
